{{Quote|I will not stand for being unemployed again!|Laita Durake|<ref name="DS" />}}
'''Laita Durake''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who served as an [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]] agent at the Customs office on her homeworld of [[Kirima (Kalinda system)|Kirima]] during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She remained at her post after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], serving aboard the [[Imperial Customs Corvette|light corvette]] ''[[Impounder]]''.
